Panjab University Design Entrance Examin.official_note: Official noticeboard of PU's School of Design where B.Des merit/admission notices are posted; server refused connection (ECONNREFUSED) at fetch time so could not confirm live. B.Des (Fashion & Lifestyle Design) admission is via PU-CET (UG); the merit list is published at cetug.puchd.ac.in / ugadmissions.puchd.ac.in. No standalone cutoff table found.

Paramedical State Common Entrance Test.official_note: Generic multi-state label; the representative official body is WBJEEB's JENPAS-UG (Joint Entrance for Nursing, Paramedical & Allied Sciences). Official portal wbjeeb.nic.in/jenpas-ug; opening/closing rank counselling reports are published under admissions.nic.in/wbjeeb (ORCR report). Already_has_data=true, extraction skipped.

Puducherry Bachelor of Business Administ.official_note: Puducherry UG (incl. BBA) admission is handled by CENTAC (Centralised Admission Committee, Govt. of Puducherry); homepage links live UG Non-NEET (Arts/Science/Commerce) draft & revised merit lists. The Shiksha link in the sheet was a generic course page (wrong). Pondicherry University BBA(Hons) UG merit lists are at admissions.pondiuni.edu.in/admissions/meritlist_UG.php. Already_has_data=true, extraction skipped.

Puducherry Polytechnic Entrance.official_note: CENTAC (Centralised Admission Committee, Govt. of Puducherry) conducts Puducherry polytechnic/diploma admission. Homepage publishes round-wise merit lists and cut-off pages (e.g. .../htmlpages/<year>/non-neet/first_round_professional_cutoff.html), but the actual cutoff values are inside linked Google Drive PDFs and merit lists are candidate-level, so no machine-readable college/branch cutoff rows could be extracted.

Punjab Bachelor of Business Administrati.official_note: Sheet pointed to a generic Shiksha course page (wrong). Panjab University BBA admission is via PU-CET (UG); merit list/cutoffs published at cetug.puchd.ac.in (UG admissions: ugadmissions.puchd.ac.in/meritdispout.php). Could not load a single dedicated BBA cutoff table; no rows extracted.

Punjab Joint Entrance Test Diploma.official_note: PSBTE & IT (Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training) conducts Punjab diploma/polytechnic admission (Punjab JET). Official site punjabteched.com (frameset) carries the Diploma Admission / merit list / seat-allotment links; allotment/merit results are behind candidate login and exam results sit at results.pbteched.net, so no static college/branch cutoff table available for extraction.

Punjab State Board of Technical Educatio.official_note: Same conducting body as Punjab JET Diploma: PSBTE & IT, punjabteched.com. Diploma admission merit lists and seat allotment are accessed via the Punjab Diploma Admission link (login-gated); diploma exam results at results.pbteched.net. No static cutoff rank table exposed for extraction.
